3. ? [X0] : (politician(X0) & member_nazi_reichstag(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~? [X0] : (politician(X0) & member_nazi_reichstag(X0)) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ! [X0] : (~politician(X0) | ~member_nazi_reichstag(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
6. politician(heinrich_schmidt) [cnf transformation 1]
7. member_nazi_reichstag(heinrich_schmidt) [cnf transformation 2]
8. ~member_nazi_reichstag(X0) | ~politician(X0) [cnf transformation 5]
9. ~politician(heinrich_schmidt) [resolution 7,8]
10. $false [forward subsumption resolution 9,6]
